scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @print-partner/server" "npm run dev -w @print-partner/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @print-partner/contracts && npm run build -w @print-partner/domain && npm run build -w @print-partner/server && npm run build -w @print-partner/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @print-partner/domain --if-present && npm run test -w @print-partner/web --if-present && npm run test -w @print-partner/server --if-present
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @print-partner/contracts && npm run build -w @print-partner/domain && npm run typecheck -w @print-partner/server && npm run typecheck -w @print-partner/web
